name: douban-obsidian
description: Create Obsidian notes for books and movies from Douban

scripts.deploy: npm run build && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const dest='../.obsidian/plugins/douban-obsidian/'; ['main.js','manifest.json','styles.css'].forEach(f=>{ if(fs.existsSync(f)) fs.copyFileSync(f, dest+f); });"
